eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Albany, WY; at 10:00 AM on MAR 1, 2019 Effective until 11:00 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the required monthly test for Albany Countywide Alerts. No action is indicated at this time. This is the required monthly test for Albany Countywide Alerts. No action is indicated at this time.
